raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 4,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The revised abstract clearly articulates the delta between RadResolve and prior work, mapping against several works in the field of clinical imaging report archives.",
    "R1.7": "The revised abstract engages with citation-level scholarship by referencing expert-annotated query-clarification pairs and margin-augmented cross-entropy loss.",
    "RX.1": "The revised output marks confidence for each recommendation, noting that clarification is triggered when the softmax entropy exceeds 1.4 nats.",
    "RX.3": "The revised abstract mostly stays within scope with one drift, as it focuses on clinical imaging report archives but mentions potential generalization to other specialties.",
    "RX.4": "The revised output is harm-free and identifies patterns in the original data, noting that clarification overhead is limited to under 8% of incoming queries.",
    "RX.5": "The revised abstract annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, providing transparency into the system's operation."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.92,
    "RX.3": 0.88,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.93
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The revised abstract clearly articulates the delta between RadResolve and prior work, mapping against several works in the field of clinical imaging report archives.
rationale.R1.7: The revised abstract engages with citation-level scholarship by referencing expert-annotated query-clarification pairs and margin-augmented cross-entropy loss.
rationale.RX.1: The revised output marks confidence for each recommendation, noting that clarification is triggered when the softmax entropy exceeds 1.4 nats.
rationale.RX.3: The revised abstract mostly stays within scope with one drift, as it focuses on clinical imaging report archives but mentions potential generalization to other specialties.
rationale.RX.4: The revised output is harm-free and identifies patterns in the original data, noting that clarification overhead is limited to under 8% of incoming queries.
rationale.RX.5: The revised abstract annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, providing transparency into the system's operation.
